summary: Soundboard recording with decent clarity despite hiss and cuts, featuring a rare Rosemary and stellar New Potato/Caboose jams.
review: The show is treasured for its rarity – the only known live Rosemary – and for explosive improvisations on Dark Star, New Potato (Caboose) and an intense Other‑One suite.  While the soundboard source sounds good overall, listeners note hiss, partial cuts and uneven editing that slightly mar the listening experience.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers (30+) give 4‑5 stars, praising the performance despite consistent complaints about hiss and editing; strong musical highlights push the rating into the good–great range.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Generally clear soundboard capture but suffers from noticeable tape hiss, frequent partial cuts and sloppy editing that interrupt song flow.

standout_songs: That's It For The Other One
show_quality.setlist_flow: The set is raw and experimental, with high‑energy jams offset by editing gaps; cuts make the sequence feel fragmented, yet the musical peaks (Rosemary, Dark Star, Caboose) keep the show compelling.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Repeatedly praised for blazing guitar work, inventive volume‑knob swells and taking requests; highlighted on Rosemary, Dark Star and New Potato.
band_member_comments.Phil: Noted for “thunder” bass and a classical‑tinged jam during the Other One suite; occasional “nasty Phil jam” on New Potato.
band_member_comments.Keys: Light keyboard textures mentioned on the acoustic intro to "He Was A Friend Of Mine"; otherwise not highlighted.
